Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Proceedings And Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS LAURENT KATGELY, ERIN KATGELY'S Motion To Stay Proceedings And Compel Arbitration is granted. Defendants have established the existence of an agreement to arbitrate this dispute. Plaintiff has not negated the evidence presented. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/JW)

Joinder In Motion To Stay Proceedings And Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS PAUL MILLER, WILLIAM MCLEOD'S Joinder In Motion To Stay Proceedings And Compel Arbitration is granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/JW)

Joinder To Stay Proceedings, And Non-Opposition To Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS CAROL RATNER, LAWRENCE RATNER, DOUBLE ENTRY'S Joinder To Stay Proceedings, And Non-Opposition To Motion To Compel Arbitration is granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/JW)
